events.description: List of transactional email activity events.

email.description: Recipient email address associated with the event.

date.description: UTC date-time when the event occurred.

messageId.description: Unique identifier of the email message.

event.description: Type of email event that occurred.

reason.description: Reason for the event if applicable, such as bounce details.

tag.description: Tag assigned to the email for categorization.

subject.description: Subject line of the email message.

templateId.description: Template ID used for the email if applicable.
